title: The Road to Sabaody
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It looked like they got some message.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Maybe they got the order to withdraw.

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: They can fly for five minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Two of our riders have returned.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you had left it to us,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no way you don't know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just thinking about that man, my back...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Get it!!? Do you get me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Y-Yes... They can't be left alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Do eGZactly what I say!!! HA... HAA...

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.
